entry.title: New IDC HDTRA114D0008 awarded to SCIENCE APPLICATIONS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: DTRA Contracting Officers are authorized to issue orders hereunder. Other Contracting Officers may issue orders with the advanced written approval of the DTRA Contracting Office.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:majorProgramCode: DTRA COMBATING WEAPONS OF MASS DESTRUCTION RESEARCH AND TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT
ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF COMBATING WEAPONS OF MASS DESTRUCTION RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT. THE SCOPE OF THIS CONTRACT INCLUDES PERFORMING RESEARCH AND TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT TO PROVIDE SCIENTIFIC AND TECHNOLOGICAL SOLUTIONS TO MEET THE DOD S NON-PROLIFERATION, COUNTERPROLIFERATION, AND CONSEQUENCE MANAGEMENT OBJECTIVES. THIS CONTRACT WILL NOT BE FOR ADVISORY AND ASSISTANCE SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- DEFENSE OTHER: OTHER (APPLIED RESEARCH/EXPLORATORY DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:claimantProgramCode.description: ALL OTHERS NOT IDENTIFIABLE TO ANY OTHER PROCUREMENT PROGRAM

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
